danger_signals.visual_form: Perspective shift to third-person behind player aircraft
danger_signals.meaning: Imminent threat requiring evasive action; loss of first-person control autonomy

danger_signals.visual_form: Enemy planes approaching from front and rear in first-person view
danger_signals.meaning: Active combat engagement; player must choose between cannon and missile attacks

danger_signals.visual_form: Distinct enemy units (War Balloon, Bomber, enemy ace pilot)
danger_signals.meaning: Escalated threat level; stage progression gates behind defeating specific targets

danger_signals.visual_form: Health degradation (not visually specified in sources)
danger_signals.meaning: Player aircraft durability decreasing; game-over condition approaching
Stage failure if timer reaches zero; pressure mechanic for mission completion

safety_signals.visual_form: Destruction of assigned targets (ships, fighters, tanks, bosses)
safety_signals.meaning: Advancement to next stage; time replenishment and armament resupply

safety_signals.visual_form: Standard cockpit view without missile lock
safety_signals.meaning: Player retains full control; no active threat requiring evasion

safety_signals.visual_form: Replenished cannon and missile loadout after mission completion
safety_signals.meaning: Preparedness for next engagement; progression reward

faction_indicators.symbol_or_sigil: Experimental aircraft designation (A8M5 upgraded to A8M6)
faction_indicators.environmental_markers: Cockpit first-person perspective; allied mission objectives

faction_indicators.symbol_or_sigil: Varied enemy aircraft and units (War Balloon, Bomber, enemy ace)
faction_indicators.enemy_visual_variants: Final adversary uses identical aircraft model to player but with enhanced durability and strength
faction_indicators.environmental_markers: Approach from front and rear; distinct visual differentiation from player craft

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: First-person cockpit view with targeting crosshair; enemy aircraft visible in airspace
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Enemies attack from multiple vectors; player can select targets and choose weapon loadout

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Automatic perspective transition to third-person trailing view behind aircraft
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Camera repositioning enables evasive maneuvers; loss of direct forward targeting

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Transition between mission zones; new enemy types and boss encounters
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Enemies scale in difficulty; boss units feature enhanced AI and durability

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Timer expiration or excessive damage accumulation reaches game-over threshold
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Gameplay halts; player cannot advance stage

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: All assigned objectives destroyed; stage completion
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Time replenishment; armament resupply; transition to next stage

environmental_storytelling.example: Selectable targets (ships, jet fighters, tanks) suggest a multi-theater military conflict requiring varied air support
Aircraft designation evolution (A8M5 → A8M6) implies iterative military technology development and mission escalation
Final enemy ace pilot using identical aircraft signals a skilled antagonist and personal rivalry; enhanced stats suggest legendary opponent status
Time-limited engagement suggests tactical pressure and real-world military operational constraints

entity_behavioral_tells.behavior: Attack from front and rear positions; respond to player targeting with evasion or counter-attack
Trigger automatic perspective shift in player camera; force player into defensive posture
Distinct visual presentation; higher durability; stage-blocking defeat requirement
Uses player's own aircraft model with enhanced stats; represents skill parity plus quantitative advantage; serves as climactic antagonist
Camera automatically transitions to third-person; player regains positional awareness for evasive maneuvers

notes: G-LOC communicates world-state primarily through perspective shifts and enemy variety rather than diegetic UI elements. The core danger signal—missile lock inducing third-person view—is a mechanical communication tool that re-contextualizes the player's spatial relationship to threat. The faction system is minimalist: player vs. unnamed enemy forces, with boss encounters serving as individual personality markers. Political context is absent; the game frames engagement as pure military action without ideological backdrop. Environmental storytelling relies on target type variety and aircraft upgrade nomenclature to hint at a broader conflict. The game's world-state communication is procedural and perspective-based rather than environmental.
sources_used: wikipedia - G-LOC: Air Battle (gameplay, release, reception sections)
